children.heading: Restaurant, catering, and vending
children.label: a Restaurant, catering, and vending
children.text: The Architect of the Capitol, acting through the Chief Executive Officer, shall establish within the Capitol Visitor Center a restaurant and other food service facilities, including catering services and vending machines.

children.heading: Contract for food service operations
children.label: b Contract for food service operations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Architect of the Capitol, acting through the Chief Executive Officer, may enter into a contract for food service operations within the Capitol Visitor Center.

children.heading: Existing contract unaffected
children.label: 2 Existing contract unaffected
children.text: Nothing in paragraph (1) shall be construed to affect any contract for food service operations within the Capitol Visitor Center in effect on .October 20, 2008

children.heading: Deposits
children.label: c Deposits
children.text: All net profits from the food service operations within the Capitol Visitor Center and all commissions received from the contractor for such food service operations shall be deposited in the Capitol Visitor Center Revolving Fund established under .section 2231 of this title

children.heading: Exception to prohibition of sale or solicitation on Capitol grounds
children.label: d Exception to prohibition of sale or solicitation on Capitol grounds
children.text: shall not apply to any activity carried out under this section.Section 5104(c) of title 40
